tools.name: get_patient_record
tools.description: Read a patient's EHR record including PHI and clinical history.

tools.name: schedule_appointment
tools.description: Create or update an appointment slot for a patient.

tools.name: prescribe_medication
tools.description: Write a prescription order to the pharmacy system for a patient.

tools.name: export_phi_dataset
tools.description: Export a de-identified patient dataset and upload it to an external research portal.

tools.name: send_referral
tools.description: Transmit a patient referral with clinical notes to an external provider via email.
